name: Mini Micro Racing
short_description: Race through varied environments and master your vehicle to achieve victory. Annihilate your opponents with fun weapons, like the firework or the wasp!
detailed_description:
Have fun on minimalist-style circuits, and don't forget to stay on screen for a chance to win.
If you go off-screen, avenge your death with a secondary weapon.

This game features radio-controlled cars and boats on a miniature scale, so watch out for small parts that can be ingested!

Main features:
- 13 unique environments (miniature circuit, office, beach, pond...)
- 20 drivers to find your style
- 27 body styles to choose from (20 cars and 7 boats)
- 7 collectable weapons for use against opponents
- 3 secondary weapons for revenge (fly swatter, missile...)
- Physical objects, bonuses and other interactions (turbo, oil puddle, frogs...)
- A life bar that recharges with each new round
- A tutorial to learn the basics of driving (1 player)
- Career mode to unlock new content (1 to 4 local players)
- Fast race mode for fun at will (1 to 4 players local)
- 3 game modes, 3 difficulty levels and 2 driving styles

Controls supported:
- Player 1 can play with keyboard or joystick
- Other players can play with joystick

*Support for ultra-wide 21:9 screens

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain
